identity.name: Sud Forno
identity.address: 132 Yonge St, Toronto, ON M5C 1X3, Canada
identity.location: 132 Yonge St, Toronto, ON M5C 1X3, Canada

narrative.summary: You're on Yonge in the Financial District, splitting between a café downstairs where espresso machines hiss and an upstairs dining room that's quieter, with clean lines and warm wood. The kitchen works in that northern Italian register—cod on celery purée so smooth it's almost a sauce, tuna treated with restraint. Expect $25-35 for pasta, $40-50 for mains, and a wine list that knows what it's doing.

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on Yonge Street in the Financial District, and Sud Forno splits itself across two floors—a café downstairs where light hits marble counters and espresso machines hiss, then a dining room upstairs that opens up into something quieter. The design leans Italian modernist: clean lines, warm wood, enough space between tables that you can actually hear your conversation. Upstairs is where you linger.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: The kitchen works in that northern Italian register—precise technique, quality product, nothing overdone. Cod comes on celery purée so smooth it's almost a sauce, tuna gets treated with the same restraint. Expect to spend around $25-35 for pasta, closer to $40-50 for mains, and the wine list knows what it's doing.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Sud Forno is a wonderful spot!
The café on the first floor is stylish and beautifully designed. The café latte and pastries were both delicious.
Upstairs, the restaurant is perfect for a relaxed meal with friends. We were able to chat comfortably while enjoying authentic Italian food.
Highly recommend for both coffee and a leisurely meal!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "There’s not much to say! A bit of what you fancy does you good! And a stop at Sud Forno on our way to Montreal is a must for our family. Service: superb, wine: excellent and the food: incredibly delicious!

Picture:
Cod with celery puree, Tonnarelli alla Norcina
italian black truffle shavings, homemade spicy sausage, pecorino, garlic"
